title: RISC-V Studio GC
description: A full RV32GC (IMAFDC + Zicsr) RISC-V machine in the browser: a two-pass assembler with compressed (RV32C) 16-bit instructions, an IEEE-754 single- AND double-precision FPU, atomics, machine-mode traps & interrupts with a memory-mapped timer, hardware counters, a time-travel stepping debugger, a memory-mapped framebuffer, a syscall console, a disassembler that expands every compressed op, shareable links, an in-app verification suite — and a from-scratch C compiler that lowers a real subset of C and runs it on the same machine.
